# Tikron

> Tikron is a **source-available (FSL-1.1), server-authoritative multiplayer SDK for web games**
> ("Supabase for game netcode", but self-hosted). You author a `Room<TState>` subclass
> (state shape + `onMessage` intent handlers) and deploy it to **your own Cloudflare
> account** — one Durable Object per room at the edge, placed near players, no lock-in.
> Clients send intents, the server owns state, every payload is validated. Optional
> hosted services (leaderboards + a usage dashboard, keyed by API key) are the only
> managed part. A pnpm + Turborepo monorepo; the primary user is a coding agent building
> a game for a non-developer. See AGENTS.md → "Limits & roadmap" before committing.

## Start here

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Read first. The operational brief — genre→preset table, the
  golden path (scaffold → run → deploy), hard rules, command reference, error-code
  table, and measured limits.
- [.claude/skills/tikron/SKILL.md](.claude/skills/tikron/SKILL.md): Read when
  building/modifying a room. Preset decision tree, room-authoring checklist, local
  smoke-test loop, deploy steps.

## Docs

- [docs/PERF.md](docs/PERF.md): Read before quoting any performance number. Measured
  load-test results (20-player AOI room, 128 CCU across 8 rooms, the flush-throttle
  before/after). Cite these; never invent latency figures.
- [examples/starter/README.md](examples/starter/README.md): Read to see a complete
  game in ~150 lines (deploy-in-5-minutes cursor arena) and how to reshape it.

## Key sources

- [packages/server/src/room.ts](packages/server/src/room.ts): Read for the room API —
  `onMessage`, `markStateChanged`/`setState`, lifecycle hooks, `allowReconnection`,
  `setSimulationInterval`, `enableAOI`, and the `maxClients`/`syncIntervalMs`/`sendAcks`
  knobs.
- [packages/server/src/define-room.ts](packages/server/src/define-room.ts): Read for how
  a `Room` becomes a Durable Object (`defineRoom`), occupancy reporting, `validateSession`,
  and `onAuth`.
- [packages/client/src/index.ts](packages/client/src/index.ts): Read for the browser SDK
  — `GameClient` (`matchmake`, `joinOrCreate`) and `Room` (`send`, `onStateChange`,
  `onMessage`, `onAck`).
- [packages/protocol/src/index.ts](packages/protocol/src/index.ts): Read for the wire
  protocol — client/server message tags and the JSON codec.
- [examples/starter/src/arena-room.ts](examples/starter/src/arena-room.ts): Read for a
  minimal, correct room to copy (validate-then-mutate handlers, reconnection).

## Tooling

- [tools/create-tikron/README.md](tools/create-tikron/README.md): Read for the
  scaffolder (`npx create-tikron my-game`) — standalone project, SDK from npm.
